info.title: 6connect Provision
info.description:
6connect Provision is an IP address management (IPAM) and network provisioning platform providing resource allocation, DNS management, and automation workflows.

Authentication: HTTP Basic — 6connect username and password. Configure API access in 6connect under Administration → Users.

Source: https://docs.6connect.com/

contact, dhcpPoolLink, dnsViewACL, dnsViewServer, dnsZoneMaster, dnsZoneServer, dnsZoneView.
